# Component: Button

## Purpose
Click target. Triggers an action.

## Variants
- **Default:** filled primary
- **Outlined:** transparent with border

## States
- **Default:** rest state
- **Loading:** dimmed with progress
- **Disabled:** muted, non-interactive

## Anatomy
~~~text
+---------------+
| [ Click me ]  |
+---------------+
~~~
